message: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

body:
## πüé· Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This bot-filed issue identifies documentation gaps in the `Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent` package following a TypeSpec emitter migration in PR #57631: the CHANGELOG `1.2.0-beta.11` section is empty and breaking changes (metadata parameter type change, enum type internalization, extension class rename) are not documented.

<details>
<summary>πü™΄ Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent` (1.2.0-beta.11, Unreleased)
**Affected API:** `PersistentAgentsAdministrationClient`, `ThreadMessages`, `ThreadRuns`, `Threads`, `VectorStores`; `AIAgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions` βÜ£ `AgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions`
**Scenarios:**
- CHANGELOG `1.2.0-beta.11 (Unreleased)` section is completely empty after emitter migration
- `metadata` parameter type changed from `IReadOnlyDictionary` to `IDictionary` across 9+ methods with no documentation
- Eight enum-like types internalized/removed from generated code, now only available as backward-compat stubs
- Extension builder class renamed without documentation

**Root ask:** Populate the CHANGELOG breaking changes section and add a migration note to README for `1.2.0-beta.11`.
</details>

<details>
<summary>πüîé Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a documentation issue; no runtime bug to reproduce. The gaps were identified by comparing PR #57631 (commit `3e09cc59`) changes against the CHANGELOG and README.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #57631 diff for all API surface changes introduced by the TypeSpec emitter migration
2. Verify `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/CHANGELOG.md` βÄî confirm the `1.2.0-beta.11 (Unreleased)` section is empty and needs populating
3. Add the breaking changes (metadata type change, extension class rename) and other changes (type internalization) to the CHANGELOG, then add a migration callout to README
</details>

<details>
<summary>πüèΖοΗè Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` βÄî The issue concerns SDK documentation and API surface changes in a client library, not the Azure service REST API itself
- **Service:** `AI Agents` βÄî Issue explicitly targets `Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent` under `sdk/ai/`
- **Confidence:** High βÄî Package name is explicitly stated, category and service are unambiguous; confirmed by quality reference issues #57183, #53817, #55561 which all use `Client` + `AI Agents`
</details>

<details>
<summary>πüëΞ Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %AI Agents` (line 85) βÄî the only entry matching the "AI Agents" service label; no more specific multi-label entry exists for `%AI Agents %Client`
- **AzureSdkOwners:** none listed
- **ServiceOwners:** @ankitbko @RaviPidaparthi
- **Routing action:** Added "Service Attention" label; @mentioned ServiceOwners via routing comment (issue is bot-filed, so "needs-team-attention" not added)
- **Scan notes:** Scanned bottom-to-top; no entries below line 85 reference `%AI Agents`. All management-specific entries (lines 904+) require `%Mgmt` and were skipped. Line 85 is the only matching entry.
</details>
